# Resolved Markets — Full API Reference

> Real-time prediction market orderbook data across crypto, sports, economics, and weather categories. High-frequency orderbook snapshots (~20Hz per token) and trades from Polymarket with ClickHouse-backed historical storage.

## Authentication

All authenticated endpoints require an API key passed via the `X-API-Key` header:

```
X-API-Key: rm_your_key
```

API keys are prefixed with `rm_`. Obtain one by signing up at resolvedmarkets.com.

WebSocket connections authenticate via a message after connecting (not via query string).

---

## Public Endpoints

### GET /health

Health check endpoint.

**Response:**

```json
{
  "status": "ok",
  "uptime": 123456,
  "timestamp": "2026-03-24T12:00:00.000Z"
}
```

### GET /v1/public-stats

Public statistics about the platform.

**Response:**

```json
{
  "snapshotCount": 15234567,
  "activeMarkets": 42,
  "cryptoPrices": {
    "BTC": 95432.50,
    "ETH": 3421.80,
    "SOL": 187.25,
    "XRP": 2.34
  },
  "timestamp": "2026-03-24T12:00:00.000Z"
}
```

---

## Market Endpoints (API Key Required)

### GET /v1/categories

List all available market categories.

**Response:**

```json
{
  "categories": ["crypto", "sports", "economics", "weather"]
}
```

### GET /v1/markets/live

List currently active markets.

**Query Parameters:**

| Param | Type | Required | Description |
|-------|------|----------|-------------|
| `category` | string | No | Filter by category (crypto, sports, economics, weather) |

**Response:**

```json
{
  "markets": [
    {
      "conditionId": "0x1234...",
      "slug": "will-btc-be-above-100000-on-march-25",
      "question": "Will BTC be above $100,000 on March 25?",
      "category": "crypto",
      "tokens": [
        {
          "tokenId": "abc123",
          "outcome": "Yes",
          "side": "UP",
          "price": 0.65
        },
        {
          "tokenId": "def456",
          "outcome": "No",
          "side": "DOWN",
          "price": 0.35
        }
      ],
      "endDate": "2026-03-25T00:00:00.000Z",
      "active": true
    }
  ]
}
```

### GET /v1/markets/history/recent

Recently resolved markets from the materialized view.

**Response:**

```json
{
  "markets": [
    {
      "conditionId": "0x1234...",
      "slug": "will-btc-be-above-95000-on-march-23",
      "question": "Will BTC be above $95,000 on March 23?",
      "category": "crypto",
      "resolvedAt": "2026-03-23T00:00:00.000Z",
      "outcome": "Yes"
    }
  ]
}
```

### GET /v1/markets/history

Full historical markets with pagination.

**Query Parameters:**

| Param | Type | Required | Description |
|-------|------|----------|-------------|
| `category` | string | No | Filter by category |
| `limit` | number | No | Results per page (default: 50, max: 200) |
| `offset` | number | No | Pagination offset |

**Response:**

```json
{
  "markets": [...],
  "total": 1500,
  "limit": 50,
  "offset": 0
}
```

### GET /v1/markets/by-slug/:slug

Look up a market by its URL slug.

**Path Parameters:**

| Param | Type | Description |
|-------|------|-------------|
| `slug` | string | Market URL slug |

**Example:** `GET /v1/markets/by-slug/will-btc-be-above-100000-on-march-25`

**Response:**

```json
{
  "market": {
    "conditionId": "0x1234...",
    "slug": "will-btc-be-above-100000-on-march-25",
    "question": "Will BTC be above $100,000 on March 25?",
    "category": "crypto",
    "tokens": [...],
    "endDate": "2026-03-25T00:00:00.000Z",
    "active": true
  }
}
```

### GET /v1/markets/by-slug/:slug/orderbook

Live orderbook for a market looked up by slug.

**Response:** Same structure as `GET /v1/markets/:id/orderbook`.

### GET /v1/markets/:id/orderbook

Live orderbook for a market by conditionId.

**Path Parameters:**

| Param | Type | Description |
|-------|------|-------------|
| `id` | string | Market conditionId |

**Response:**

```json
{
  "market": {
    "conditionId": "0x1234...",
    "tokens": {
      "UP": {
        "tokenId": "abc123",
        "bids": [
          { "price": 0.65, "size": 1500.00 },
          { "price": 0.64, "size": 2300.00 }
        ],
        "asks": [
          { "price": 0.66, "size": 800.00 },
          { "price": 0.67, "size": 1200.00 }
        ],
        "bestBid": 0.65,
        "bestAsk": 0.66,
        "midPrice": 0.655,
        "spread": 0.01,
        "totalBidDepth": 15000.00,
        "totalAskDepth": 12000.00
      },
      "DOWN": {
        "tokenId": "def456",
        "bids": [...],
        "asks": [...],
        "bestBid": 0.34,
        "bestAsk": 0.35,
        "midPrice": 0.345,
        "spread": 0.01,
        "totalBidDepth": 14000.00,
        "totalAskDepth": 11000.00
      }
    },
    "timestamp": "2026-03-24T12:00:00.123Z"
  }
}
```

### GET /v1/markets/:id/snapshots

Paginated historical orderbook snapshots.

**Path Parameters:**

| Param | Type | Description |
|-------|------|-------------|
| `id` | string | Market conditionId |

**Query Parameters:**

| Param | Type | Required | Description |
|-------|------|----------|-------------|
| `limit` | number | No | Results per page (default: 100, max: 1000) |
| `offset` | number | No | Pagination offset |
| `from` | string | No | Start timestamp (ISO 8601) |
| `to` | string | No | End timestamp (ISO 8601) |
| `tokenSide` | string | No | Filter by token side: `UP` or `DOWN` |

**Response:**

```json
{
  "snapshots": [
    {
      "tokenId": "abc123",
      "tokenSide": "UP",
      "bids": [
        { "price": 0.65, "size": 1500.00 }
      ],
      "asks": [
        { "price": 0.66, "size": 800.00 }
      ],
      "bestBid": 0.65,
      "bestAsk": 0.66,
      "midPrice": 0.655,
      "spread": 0.01,
      "totalBidDepth": 15000.00,
      "totalAskDepth": 12000.00,
      "eventTimestamp": "2026-03-24T12:00:00.100Z",
      "captureTimestamp": "2026-03-24T12:00:00.123Z",
      "sequenceNumber": 42567
    }
  ],
  "total": 50000,
  "limit": 100,
  "offset": 0
}
```

### GET /v1/markets/:id/summary

Aggregated market statistics.

**Path Parameters:**

| Param | Type | Description |
|-------|------|-------------|
| `id` | string | Market conditionId |

**Response:**

```json
{
  "summary": {
    "conditionId": "0x1234...",
    "avgSpread": 0.012,
    "minSpread": 0.005,
    "maxSpread": 0.025,
    "avgMidPrice": 0.652,
    "priceRange": { "low": 0.58, "high": 0.72 },
    "avgBidDepth": 14500.00,
    "avgAskDepth": 12300.00,
    "snapshotCount": 85000,
    "tradeCount": 3200,
    "period": "24h"
  }
}
```

---

## Snapshot Endpoints (API Key Required)

### GET /api/snapshot

Retrieve a historical snapshot at a specific timestamp.

**Query Parameters:**

| Param | Type | Required | Description |
|-------|------|----------|-------------|
| `timestamp` | string | Yes | ISO 8601 timestamp |
| `marketId` | string | Yes | Market conditionId |

**Example:** `GET /api/snapshot?timestamp=2026-03-24T12:00:00Z&marketId=0x1234`

**Response:**

```json
{
  "snapshot": {
    "tokenId": "abc123",
    "tokenSide": "UP",
    "bids": [...],
    "asks": [...],
    "bestBid": 0.65,
    "bestAsk": 0.66,
    "midPrice": 0.655,
    "spread": 0.01,
    "eventTimestamp": "2026-03-24T12:00:00.100Z",
    "captureTimestamp": "2026-03-24T12:00:00.123Z",
    "sequenceNumber": 42567,
    "cryptoPriceStalenessMs": 45
  }
}
```

### GET /api/snapshot/latest

Retrieve the last 5 snapshots across all tokens.

**Response:**

```json
{
  "snapshots": [...]
}
```

---

## WebSocket API

### Endpoint: /ws/orderbook

Real-time orderbook stream via WebSocket.

**Connection Flow:**

1. Connect to `wss://api.resolvedmarkets.com/ws/orderbook`
2. Send auth message within 5 seconds:

```json
{ "type": "auth", "apiKey": "rm_your_key" }
```

3. Receive auth confirmation:

```json
{ "type": "auth", "status": "ok" }
```

4. Subscribe to a crypto:

```json
{ "type": "subscribe", "crypto": "BTC" }
```

5. Receive real-time orderbook updates:

```json
{
  "type": "snapshot",
  "crypto": "BTC",
  "tokenSide": "UP",
  "tokenId": "abc123",
  "bids": [...],
  "asks": [...],
  "bestBid": 0.65,
  "bestAsk": 0.66,
  "midPrice": 0.655,
  "spread": 0.01,
  "timestamp": "2026-03-24T12:00:00.123Z"
}
```

**Auth timeout:** 5 seconds. Connection closed with code `4001` if not authenticated.

**Subscription options for crypto:** `BTC`, `ETH`, `SOL`, `XRP`

---

## API Key Management (Clerk Auth Required)

These endpoints require Clerk session authentication (not API key auth).

### POST /v1/api-keys

Generate a new API key.

**Response:**

```json
{
  "key": "rm_abc123...",
  "id": "key_id_123",
  "createdAt": "2026-03-24T12:00:00.000Z"
}
```

### GET /v1/api-keys

List all API keys for the authenticated user.

**Response:**

```json
{
  "keys": [
    {
      "id": "key_id_123",
      "prefix": "rm_abc1...",
      "createdAt": "2026-03-24T12:00:00.000Z",
      "lastUsedAt": "2026-03-24T11:55:00.000Z",
      "requestCount": 4521
    }
  ]
}
```

### GET /v1/api-keys/validate

Validate an API key (pass via `X-API-Key` header).

**Response:**

```json
{
  "valid": true,
  "tier": "pro"
}
```

### DELETE /v1/api-keys/:key

Revoke an API key.

**Response:**

```json
{
  "success": true
}
```

---

## Payment Endpoints (Clerk Auth Required)

### GET /user/tier

Get current tier information for the authenticated user.

**Response:**

```json
{
  "tier": "pro",
  "credits": 4500,
  "rateLimit": 500,
  "maxApiKeys": 5,
  "maxWsConnections": 2,
  "historyAccess": "30d"
}
```

### GET /payments/packs

List available credit packs.

**Response:**

```json
{
  "packs": [
    {
      "id": "pack_starter",
      "name": "Starter Pack",
      "credits": 1000,
      "price": 9.99,
      "currency": "USD"
    }
  ]
}
```

### POST /payments/create-invoice

Create a crypto payment invoice via NOWPayments.

**Request Body:**

```json
{
  "packId": "pack_starter"
}
```

**Response:**

```json
{
  "invoiceUrl": "https://nowpayments.io/payment/...",
  "invoiceId": "inv_123",
  "amount": 9.99,
  "currency": "USD"
}
```

---

## Stats Endpoints (Clerk Auth + API Key Required)

### GET /v1/stats

Platform statistics (authenticated users only).

**Response:**

```json
{
  "totalSnapshots": 15234567,
  "totalTrades": 892341,
  "activeMarkets": 42,
  "uptimeHours": 2160,
  "avgSnapshotsPerSecond": 80
}
```

---

## Error Handling

All errors follow a consistent format:

```json
{
  "error": "Error message describing what went wrong",
  "code": "ERROR_CODE"
}
```

### HTTP Status Codes

| Code | Meaning |
|------|---------|
| 200 | Success |
| 400 | Bad request — invalid parameters |
| 401 | Unauthorized — missing or invalid API key |
| 403 | Forbidden — insufficient tier access |
| 404 | Not found — market or resource doesn't exist |
| 429 | Rate limited — too many requests |
| 500 | Internal server error |

### Common Error Codes

| Code | Description |
|------|-------------|
| `INVALID_API_KEY` | API key is missing, malformed, or revoked |
| `RATE_LIMITED` | Request rate exceeded for your tier |
| `TIER_RESTRICTED` | Feature not available on your tier |
| `MARKET_NOT_FOUND` | No market with the given conditionId or slug |
| `INVALID_TIMESTAMP` | Timestamp parameter is not valid ISO 8601 |
| `INVALID_PARAMS` | One or more query parameters are invalid |

### Rate Limits

Rate limit headers are included in every response:

```
X-RateLimit-Limit: 500
X-RateLimit-Remaining: 487
X-RateLimit-Reset: 1711278060
```

---

## Data Model Reference

### Market

| Field | Type | Description |
|-------|------|-------------|
| `conditionId` | string | Unique market identifier (hex) |
| `slug` | string | URL-friendly market identifier |
| `question` | string | Human-readable market question |
| `category` | string | One of: crypto, sports, economics, weather |
| `tokens` | Token[] | UP and DOWN tokens with orderbooks |
| `endDate` | string | Market resolution date (ISO 8601) |
| `active` | boolean | Whether market is currently trading |

### Token

| Field | Type | Description |
|-------|------|-------------|
| `tokenId` | string | Unique token identifier |
| `outcome` | string | "Yes" or "No" |
| `side` | string | "UP" or "DOWN" |
| `price` | number | Current token price (0-1) |

### Orderbook Snapshot

| Field | Type | Description |
|-------|------|-------------|
| `tokenId` | string | Token this snapshot belongs to |
| `tokenSide` | string | "UP" or "DOWN" |
| `bids` | Level[] | Bid levels sorted by price descending |
| `asks` | Level[] | Ask levels sorted by price ascending |
| `bestBid` | number | Highest bid price |
| `bestAsk` | number | Lowest ask price |
| `midPrice` | number | (bestBid + bestAsk) / 2 |
| `spread` | number | bestAsk - bestBid |
| `totalBidDepth` | number | Sum of all bid sizes |
| `totalAskDepth` | number | Sum of all ask sizes |
| `eventTimestamp` | string | When Polymarket emitted the event |
| `captureTimestamp` | string | When our server processed it |
| `sequenceNumber` | number | For gap detection in the stream |
| `cryptoPriceStalenessMs` | number | Ms since last crypto price update |

### Level

| Field | Type | Description |
|-------|------|-------------|
| `price` | number | Price level (0-1) |
| `size` | number | Size at this level |

### Trade

| Field | Type | Description |
|-------|------|-------------|
| `tokenId` | string | Token traded |
| `price` | number | Trade price |
| `size` | number | Trade size |
| `side` | string | "buy" or "sell" |
| `timestamp` | string | Trade timestamp (ISO 8601) |

---

## Market Categories

### Crypto

Prediction markets on whether BTC, ETH, SOL, or XRP will be above/below certain price levels at specific times. Markets span 4 timeframes: 5 minutes, 15 minutes, 1 hour, and 1 day.

### Sports

Prediction markets on game outcomes for NBA, NFL, and EPL (English Premier League) matches.

### Economics

Markets on macroeconomic events:
- **FOMC** — Federal Reserve interest rate decisions
- **NFP** — Non-Farm Payrolls reports

### Weather

Environmental prediction markets:
- **Daily temperatures** — 30 major cities worldwide
- **Hurricanes** — Storm path and intensity predictions
- **Arctic** — Sea ice extent and temperature anomalies

---

## MCP Server

The MCP (Model Context Protocol) server enables AI agents to query Resolved Markets data.

### Installation

The MCP server is included in the monorepo at `packages/mcp-server`.

### Configuration

| Env Var | Default | Description |
|---------|---------|-------------|
| `HF_API_URL` | `http://localhost:3001` | Backend API URL |
| `HF_API_KEY` | — | API key for authentication |
| `MCP_TRANSPORT` | `stdio` | Transport: `stdio` or `http` |
| `MCP_PORT` | `3002` | Port for HTTP transport |

### Tools

| Tool | Description |
|------|-------------|
| `list_markets` | List active markets, optionally filtered by category |
| `get_orderbook` | Get live orderbook for a market |
| `get_snapshot` | Get historical snapshot at a timestamp |
| `query_snapshots` | Query historical snapshots with filters |
| `get_market_summary` | Get aggregated market statistics |
| `get_system_stats` | Get platform health and stats |

### Resources

| URI | Description |
|-----|-------------|
| `markets://live` | All currently active markets |
| `prices://latest` | Latest crypto prices |

---

## CLI

Install the CLI globally:

```bash
npm install -g resolved-markets-cli
```

Set your API key:

```bash
export RESOLVED_MARKETS_API_KEY=rm_your_key
```

---

## Tiers & Pricing

| Feature | Free | Pro ($29/mo) | Enterprise ($99/mo) |
|---------|------|-------------|---------------------|
| Rate limit | 60/min | 500/min | 3000/min |
| History access | 1 hour | 30 days | Full archive |
| WebSocket | No | 2 connections | 10 connections |
| MCP access | No | Read-only | Full |
| Max API keys | 1 | 5 | 20 |

Payments are processed via NOWPayments (cryptocurrency). Prepaid credit packs are also available.
